origin.address: 1 Ferry Building, San Francisco, CA 94105, USA

destination.address: Union Square, San Francisco, CA 94108, USA

routes.explanation: This route scores 37 out of 100. Main concerns nearby include assault and larceny theft — consider the safer alternative if available.

navigationCues.description: You're starting at the Ferry Building with a wide sidewalk along the Embarcadero. Head southwest on Market Street — good visibility and plenty of foot traffic.
Midway on Market Street you'll pass busy storefronts and a well-lit corridor. Stay on the main sidewalk; incident reports note occasional thefts in this area.
